eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Jim Wells, TX; at 09:30 AM ON APR 2, 2026 Effective until 10:30 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Orange Grove Office of Emergency Management: This is a TEST of the Public Warning System. THIS IS ONLY A TEST.

If this were a real emergency, additional information would be provided such as the hazard type, location, protective action, expiration time (if known), and where to obtain additional information. 

Please complete this survey: https://survey.be-alert.info
